positive: A whimsical and aesthetically pleasing depiction of a celestial forest meeting an enchanted meadow at twilight. The scene features stylized, interconnected bioluminescent flora, large stylized moon flowers, and several gentle, fantastical woodland creatures (e.g., fox silhouettes, deer with glowing antlers, hummingbirds). The main composition should be centered and highly detailed, utilizing deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and glowing gold accents for a magical, dreamlike quality. The art style must be a blend of ornate Japanese woodblock printing (Ukiyo-e influence) combined with delicate line art and vibrant, clean gouache color fills. Ensure strong, recognizable silhouettes against the complex background. Perfect for all-over apparel printing, with high contrast and clear delineation between subject and background. Composition should be symmetrical yet dynamic.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, lettering, cropped, artifact, blurry, low detail, poor quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, messy, abstract
